rows.description: Height of bead flash < 1 mm (bladder groove excluded)
Hollow (Concave surface / Indentation / Depression) at bead

rows.description: Size of imperfections < 5 x 5 x 0.5 mm
Number or size more than above
Barcode is placed between taper and rim line
Length of material flow over barcode < 2 mm
Difference in width of SS & NSS bead (Heel to Toe) < 2mm
Rounding of bead toe < 2 mm, no exposer / damage of cord
Zone B: Diameter of blister < 3 mm, height < 2 mm and number
of blisters maximum 3 (All three conditions must be true) Zone B & A: Diameter of blister > 3 mm and < 15 mm or number
